meaning: n.(杯,碗等)边,边缘,(河)边vt.注满,使满溢vi.满溢
examples: Her glass was filled right up to the brim.
Rain dripped from the brim of his baseball cap.
Her hat was an amazing affair with feathers and a huge brim.
When she can, she goes fishing for catfish and brim on nearby Lake Ferguson.
Russians often trim off the brim and place it in the centre of a serving plate.
